name: Baked Tomatoes#2
recipeInstructions:
1. Use small tomatoes, any amount you desire.
2. Wash, dry, and cut off the stem.
3. Remove the seeds from the inside of the tomatoes.
4. Fill each tomato with a mixture of corn bread crumbs and butter.
5. Sprinkle salt and pepper on top of the tomatoes.
6. Place the tomatoes in a greased pan.
7. Fill around the tomatoes with additional breadcrumbs.
8. Dot the tops of the tomatoes with small pieces of butter.
9. Bake at 325 degrees Fahrenheit until the tomatoes are cooked through.
